items.title: Tracking AMG's Yacktman Asset Management Portfolio - Q2 2025 Update
items.description: Yacktman Asset Management's Q2 2025 13F portfolio value dipped slightly to $7.44B. Click here to read more about the portfolio.

items.title: If You'd Invested $1,000 in UnitedHealth Group 3 Years Ago, Here's How Much You'd Have Today
items.description: UnitedHealth Group has been hit with a series of bad news lately.

items.title: July earnings update: Boeing, UnitedHealth Group, Starbucks, Coca-Cola and BlackRock
items.description: Cathy Smith of Starbucks talks long-term cost structure, John Murphy of Coca-Cola focuses on margin expansion and Kim Kuryea of General Dynamics highlights record backlog and cash flow.

items.title: Cigna: Looks More Interesting Here Than UnitedHealth Group
items.description: Cigna's stock offers potential 35% upside with strong earnings & attractive valuation.

items.title: The great Medicare Advantage contraction appears set to continue
items.description: Insurers plan to keep sacrificing MA growth for profitability next year, after second quarter results for Humana and CVS showed the success of the strategy.
